name: Hamalaya Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine soup, water, onion, salt and pepper in a saucepan.
2. Mix well and bring to a boil over medium heat (or microwave about 4-5 minutes on high).
3. Pour half of the mixture into a greased 1 1/2 qt casserole dish.
4. Add the Minute rice from the box into the casserole dish.
5. Combine ham and beans, then place on top.
6. Cover with the remaining soup and sprinkle with grated cheese and paprika if desired.
7. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes.
